description: Installs a generated MK7 plugin: validates, writes files to the correct directory (tools/, agent/skills/, system/), compiles, and spawns the process. Access to the full MK7 project tree — not sandboxed to workspace/.

capabilities.name: tool.plugin.install
capabilities.description: Install a generated plugin from its artifacts. Writes plugin.json, Java source, and persona.md to the correct MK7 directory based on type, pre-compiles, and spawns the process.

javaCode.description: Java source inline (empty for agent type)

javaFilePath.description: Filename of Java source already written to workspace/ (preferred over javaCode)

overwrite.description: If true, kill the running process, delete the existing directory, and reinstall. Default: false.
